keyPoints: A 4-bit full adder requires 2 carry-in lines (C0 and C1) and 1 carry-out line (CO).
A 4-bit full subtractor requires 2 borrow-in lines (B0 and B1) and 1 borrow-out line (BO).
To design a 4-bit full adder, use 2 AND gates, 2 OR gates, 2 NOT gates, 1 XOR gate, and 1 clock (CLK) line.
To design a 4-bit full subtractor, use 2 AND gates, 2 OR gates, 2 NOT gates, 1 XOR gate, and 1 clock (CLK) line.
Use basic gates to simulate the full adder and subtractor, and verify the results using truth tables and logic simulation tools.
